    What's New

  • Preliminary Report: Serious Incident involving M/s Swiss International Air Line Airbus A330-343 aircraft, bearing registration HB-JHK at Delhi, India on 26 April 2026 (Indian Standard Time)

Investigation Reports

अन्वेषण रिपोर्टें

Occurrences investigated by AAIB

वेबसाइट गुणवत्ता प्रमाणपत्र

Report an Accident or Serious Incident

दुर्घटना या गंभीर घटनायों की सूचना दें

Telephone No. : +91-11-24654027, +91-11-24654017, +91-11-24658051                                                  Email Address : aaib[dot]moca[at]nic[dot]in, dg[dot]aaib-moca[at]gov[dot]in
संपर्क सूची : +91-11-24654027, +91-11-24654017, +91-11-24658051                                                                    ई-मेल पता : aaib[dot]moca[at]nic[dot]in, dg[dot]aaib-moca[at]gov[dot]in


Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau
Udaan Bhawan
Aurobindo Marg
New Delhi-110003
India
